title: ONClient
description: This Mod add Client-Like Features. Like a Custom Menu, little Modules and Capes. This mod does not add hacks/cheats.
body:
# 🚀 ONClient – The Ultimate Vanilla+ HUD & Feature Client

**ONClient** is a sleek, all-in-one modification for Minecraft **1.21.11** designed to enhance your gameplay with essential Quality-of-Life features, wrapped in a beautiful, modern, and minimalist user interface. 

Unlike heavy, bloated client launchers that restrict what you can play, ONClient is lightweight and built with **maximum compatibility** in mind—making it the perfect addition to your existing modpacks or custom mod setups!

> **⚠️ 100% Fair Play:** ONClient is purely a Quality-of-Life utility. It contains **no cheats, no hacks, and no unfair advantages**. It is fully compliant and safe to use on your favorite multiplayer servers!

---

## 🧩 Great Mod Compatibility
ONClient doesn't touch engine rendering or performance internals, meaning it **works perfectly alongside other mods**. Whether you want to pair it with Sodium, Iris Shaders, or your favorite gameplay mods, ONClient blends right into your setup without causing conflicts.

---

## 🔥 Features & Modules

Easily toggle your modules on or off using our clean, built-in GUI menu:

### 📺 Render & HUD
* **FPS Counter:** Keep a crisp, real-time eye on your frames per second.
* **Keystrokes:** Displays your movement and mouse inputs (WASD, Space, LMB, RMB) directly on screen—perfect for PvP or recording content.
* **Coordinates Display:** A compact HUD element showing your current X/Y/Z position and facing direction.
* **Fullbright:** No more pitch-black caves. Perfect visibility, anytime, anywhere.
* **Armor HUD:** Keep track of your armor's durability right in your main view.
* **Zoom:** Smoothly focus on distant objects with a dedicated zoom function.
* **Custom Cape:** Show off your exclusive, built-in ONClient cape!

### 🏃 Movement
* **Auto Sprint:** Automatically sprint without continuously holding down extra keys.
* **Toggle Sneak:** Keep sneaking toggled with a single press to save your fingers.

---

## 📌 Current Limitations & Future Plans
* **Fixed HUD Positions:** Please note that HUD elements (like Keystrokes, FPS, and Coordinates) currently have **fixed screen positions** and cannot be dragged or repositioned yet. 
* **What's Next:** Full HUD customization, element resizing, and draggable modules are planned for an upcoming release!

---

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Ensure you are running **Minecraft 1.21.11**.
2. Download the `.jar` file and drop it into your `mods` folder along with any other mods you like.
3. Boot up the game to experience the beautiful new main menu hub and clean module setup!
